description: Configure the shared kitchen Chrome browser on a prep station tablet previously used by the accounting manager to meet the IT requirements found in ~/Desktop/prep_station_config.txt. Organize bookmarks into three culinary/safety folders, move non-kitchen bookmarks to an 'Office_Archive' folder, and set the browser font size to 'Very Large'. Additionally, add custom search engines for 'usda' and 'recipe', set the download directory to ~/Documents/HACCP_Logs with the download prompt disabled, and configure the browser to open startup pages for Sysco and ServSafe.
